name: Crocked Pineapple Chicken
recipeIngredient: 6 whole chicken breast halves without skin, skinned and split
20 ounces pineapple chunks in juice, 1 can tidbits
recipeInstructions:
1. Place the chicken pieces at the bottom of the crockpot.
2. Sprinkle with pepper and paprika.
3. In a small bowl, mix together the drained pineapple chunks, Dijon mustard, and soy sauce.
4. Pour this mixture over the chicken.
5. Add the minced garlic.
6. Cover and cook on LOW for 7-9 hours or HIGH for 3-4 hours. Makes 6 servings.
Note: The recipe I downloaded did not specify the amount of soy sauce. I estimated using the above measure, which seemed fine but may affect the sodium content.
